title: spatalla procera
intro: Spatalla procera, also known as the Cape bee orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Spatalla procera are thought to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Spatalla procera can be prepared as an infusion or decoction to be consumed as a tea, or as a tincture for topical application, although its use and effectiveness have not been extensively scientifically studied.
